info.name: Testcase Generator - API Gateway
info.description: All requests go through gatewayserver. Import this collection into Postman and run Auth > Sign In first to save the bearer token.

response.name: Fetch Project
response.body:
{
    "createdAt": "2026-05-25T15:24:41.603118",
    "description": "Ecommerce project for generating and managing test cases",
    "id": 1,
    "lastModifiedAt": null,
    "name": "Ecommerce Project"
}

response.name: Fetch All Projects
Search Projects
Create Requirement
Fetch Requirement
response.body:
{
    "createdAt": "2026-05-25T15:25:04.496296",
    "id": 1,
    "lasModifiedAt": null,
    "projectId": 1,
    "title": "User login",
    "userStory": "As a user, I want to log in using email and password so that I can access my account securely"
}

response.name: Fetch All Requirements By Project
Generate Testcases For Requirement
response.body:
{
    "testCases": [
        {
            "expected_result": "User is successfully authenticated and redirected to their account dashboard",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter valid email address in email field",
                "Enter correct password in password field",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Valid user login with correct credentials",
            "type": "positive"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid email format and prevents login",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter email address without '@' symbol (e.g., 'testexample.com')",
                "Enter valid password in password field",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with invalid email format",
            "type": "negative"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System rejects the input and displays generic error message without exposing database information",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter valid email address",
                "Enter SQL injection string in password field (e.g., \"' OR '1'='1\")",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with SQL injection in password field",
            "type": "negative"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System displays validation error indicating both fields are required",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Leave email field empty",
                "Leave password field empty",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with empty email and password fields",
            "type": "boundary"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid credentials",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter email address that does not exist in system (e.g., 'nonexistent@example.com')",
                "Enter any password in password field",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with non-existent email address",
            "type": "negative"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid credentials",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter valid registered email address",
                "Enter incorrect password (wrong combination of characters)",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with incorrect password",
            "type": "negative"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System accepts the input and processes the login request appropriately",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter email address at maximum allowed length (e.g., 254 characters)",
                "Enter password at maximum allowed length",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with maximum length email and password",
            "type": "boundary"
        },
        {
            "expected_result": "System sanitizes input and does not execute or render any scripts, displaying appropriate error if invalid",
            "steps": [
                "Navigate to login page",
                "Enter valid email address",
                "Enter password containing special characters and symbols (e.g., '<script>alert(1)</script>')",
                "Click on login button"
            ],
            "title": "Login attempt with special characters in password",
            "type": "negative"
        }
    ]
}

response.name: Get Testcases By Requirement
response.body:
[
    {
        "expected_result": "User is authenticated and redirected to the dashboard",
        "id": 1,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to the login page",
            "Enter a valid email address",
            "Enter the correct password",
            "Click the login button"
        ],
        "title": "Valid User Login",
        "type": "positive"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "User is successfully authenticated and redirected to their account dashboard or home page",
        "id": 2,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address in email field",
            "Enter correct password in password field",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Valid login with correct email and password",
        "type": "positive"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays validation error message indicating invalid email format and prevents login",
        "id": 3,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter email address without @ symbol (e.g., testexample.com)",
            "Enter valid password in password field",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with invalid email format",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid credentials and prevents access",
        "id": 4,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address",
            "Enter wrong password (different from registered password)",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with incorrect password",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid credentials without revealing whether email exists",
        "id": 5,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter email address that is not registered in the system",
            "Enter any valid password",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with non-existent email address",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays validation error message indicating email is required and prevents login",
        "id": 6,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Leave email field empty",
            "Enter valid password in password field",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with empty email field",
        "type": "boundary"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays validation error message indicating password is required and prevents login",
        "id": 7,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address",
            "Leave password field empty",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with empty password field",
        "type": "boundary"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System prevents SQL injection attack, displays generic error message, and does not grant unauthorized access",
        "id": 8,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter SQL injection payload in email field (e.g., admin@example.com' OR '1'='1)",
            "Enter any password",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with SQL injection in email field",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System handles special characters safely without executing scripts and displays appropriate error or prevents login",
        "id": 9,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address",
            "Enter password containing special characters (e.g., <script>alert('xss')</script>)",
            "Click on login/submit button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with special characters in password",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "User is successfully authenticated and redirected to their account dashboard",
        "id": 10,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address in email field",
            "Enter correct password in password field",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Valid user login with correct credentials",
        "type": "positive"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid email format and prevents login",
        "id": 11,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter email address without '@' symbol (e.g., 'testexample.com')",
            "Enter valid password in password field",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with invalid email format",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System rejects the input and displays generic error message without exposing database information",
        "id": 12,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address",
            "Enter SQL injection string in password field (e.g., \"' OR '1'='1\")",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with SQL injection in password field",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays validation error indicating both fields are required",
        "id": 13,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Leave email field empty",
            "Leave password field empty",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with empty email and password fields",
        "type": "boundary"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid credentials",
        "id": 14,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter email address that does not exist in system (e.g., 'nonexistent@example.com')",
            "Enter any password in password field",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with non-existent email address",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System displays error message indicating invalid credentials",
        "id": 15,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid registered email address",
            "Enter incorrect password (wrong combination of characters)",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with incorrect password",
        "type": "negative"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System accepts the input and processes the login request appropriately",
        "id": 16,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter email address at maximum allowed length (e.g., 254 characters)",
            "Enter password at maximum allowed length",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with maximum length email and password",
        "type": "boundary"
    },
    {
        "expected_result": "System sanitizes input and does not execute or render any scripts, displaying appropriate error if invalid",
        "id": 17,
        "steps": [
            "Navigate to login page",
            "Enter valid email address",
            "Enter password containing special characters and symbols (e.g., '<script>alert(1)</script>')",
            "Click on login button"
        ],
        "title": "Login attempt with special characters in password",
        "type": "negative"
    }
]
